alkylation reagent: incubated in AB containing 50 mM IAA (iodoacetamide) for 45 min
alkylation concentration: incubated in AB containing 50 mM IAA (iodoacetamide) for 45 min
cleavage agent: digested with 50 ng trypsin (sequencing grade, Promega) overnight
collision energy: HCD fragmentation with a stepped collision energy (25, 35, and 50)
enrichment method: injected onto a column functionalized with polyclonal antibodies anti-SpaCBA
fractionation method: a second step of purification consisting of a size exclusion chromatography step
fragmentation method: HCD fragmentation with a stepped collision energy
instrument: an Orbitrap ID-X Tribrid mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific)
